text:
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
150g podded broad beans
1oog podded peas
60g green or runner beans, cut into 5mm lengths
1 tbsp chopped parsley
1 tbsp chopped chives

Pour the vegetable stock into a large saucepan, add the leek and celery and bring to a simmer. Season lightly with salt and pepper and let simmer for
15 minutes.

Meanwhile, blanch the broad beans in boiling salted water for 3-4 minutes, then drain and refresh under the cold tap. Remove the tough skins from any larger
Broad beans; leave small ones as they are.

Add the peas and green beans to the simmering stock and cook for a further 10 minutes. Add the broad beans, chopped parsley and chives, and simmer for another 5 minutes. Re-season if necessary before serving.
